description: Style Note If simple, sleek and smart is your style mantra then this bustier dress from tonga is just the thing for you. Its blended fabric composition and knit structure makes the dress cling ever so slightly to your body, giving you a flattering silhouette. Pair it with shiny stilettos and long earrings to take any party by storm. Product Details Teal bustier dress, empire line with princess panels, white corded piping, embroidery and top stitch detailing on upper panels, concealed zipper with hook on the left Material and Care 44% Polyester 52% Rayon and 4%Spandex Dry clean only Size and Fit Slim fit The model( height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
